<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements; use Spatie\Html\BaseElement; use Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes\Disabled; /** * @method static legendIf(bool $condition, \Spatie\Html\HtmlElement|string $contents) * @method static legendIfNotNull(bool $condition, \Spatie\Html\HtmlElement|string $contents) * @method static legendUnless(bool $condition, \Spatie\Html\HtmlElement|string $contents) */ class Fieldset extends BaseElement { use Disabled; protected $tag = 'fieldset'; /** * @param \Spatie\Html\HtmlElement|string $contents * * @return static */ public function legend($contents) { return $this->prependChild( Legend::create()->text($contents) ); } }
